stories.story: As an operator, I want to create a schedule that runs a billing workflow every midnight so that invoices are generated automatically.
As an operator, I want overlap protection so that a slow-running scheduled workflow doesn't cause duplicate executions.
As an operator, I want to pause and resume schedules during maintenance windows.
As an operator, I want the engine to catch up on missed triggers after downtime so that no scheduled work is silently dropped.
As a developer, I want to use standard cron expressions to define trigger timing so that I can reuse my existing scheduling knowledge.
As an operator, I want to list and describe all active schedules so that I can audit what's running.
As an engine developer, I want schedule state derived from events so that it survives restarts and is consistent with the durability model.
